Scope: Completes prosumer/RES framework (individual & collective prosumers; settlement, connection, balancing). Key enabler for Article 10 solar obligations and electrification in MEPS packages.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: ANRE Orders 15/2022 & 95/2022; subsequent adjustments; public consultations (2024–2025).

Scope: Grants for residential PV + (2024) mandatory storage; standardized rules and accredited installers. Aligned with MEPS triggers for roof-level works.
